repo_prior_art.cite: parent eid_lp_svar_nonequiv/v1: eta=0 inclusion/equality boundary; parent excluded as upgrade baseline

published_prior_art.cite: PlagborgMollerWolf2021: common-identifying-restriction LP/VAR equivalence including sign restrictions

repo_prior_art.cite: none beyond parent eid_lp_svar_nonequiv/v1, which only posed eta=0 independent-shock cumulant contact

published_prior_art.cite: PlagborgMollerWolf2021/GourierouxMonfortRenne2017/LanneMeitzSaikkonen2017/LanneLiuLuoto2026/HoeschLeeMesters2024: closest papers cover common-restriction LP/VAR equivalence, non-Gaussian SVAR identification, dependent-shock co-moment restrictions, or robust inference, not an observable eta-leakage LP/SVAR support frontier

repo_prior_art.cite: none beyond parent eid_lp_svar_nonequiv/v1 two-shock eta=0 witness; upgrade adds eta-leakage residual and global rotation/reflection components

published_prior_art.cite: Guay2021/AriasRubioRamirezWaggoner2018: higher-moment rank and sign-zero rotation algorithms, not an LP-support-angle leakage residual formula

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Make Conjecture 2 more operational by spelling out the rotation and reflection component quartic residuals separately rather than leaving them as r_4(phi,kappa;P).
Add one boundary corollary partitioning eta_w^dagger(P)=0, 0<eta_w^dagger(P)<infty, and eta_w^dagger(P)=+infty into common contact, strict separation interval, and diagonal-contact infeasibility.
Add a short note connecting eta_w^dagger(P) to an implementable semialgebraic or SOS relaxation so the diagnostic is visibly computable beyond the two-shock case.

recommended_next_step: Proceed to Stage 0 with Conjecture 1 as the flagship kernel and Conjecture 2 as the computable witness.

upgrade_review.upgrade_delta_one_line: The proposal strictly widens the parent eta=0 independent-shock cumulant-diagonalization corner to eta-bounded off-diagonal co-kurtosis leakage and includes the mandatory eta=0 parent reduction.
